message:
feat(freeze): auto-generate JS block fallback functions

Implemented automatic generation of __block_fallback_{func} functions:

Changes:
- Modified frozen_registry.zig to generate JS fallbacks in frozen_init()
- Fallbacks are evaluated once at init time using JS_Eval()
- Each partial freeze function gets a block fallback
- Fallbacks re-execute original function (function-level for now)

Generated code in frozen_init:
```c
const char *fallback_code =
    "globalThis.__block_fallback_testPartial = function(...args) {\n"
    "  const locals = args[args.length - 3];\n"
    "  const originalArgs = args.slice(0, -3);\n"
    "  const original = globalThis.__original_testPartial;\n"
    "  const result = original(...originalArgs);\n"
    "  return { return_value: result };\n"
    "};\n";
JS_Eval(ctx, fallback_code, ...);
```

Status:
✅ JS fallback functions auto-generated
✅ Injected at frozen_init time
✅ Block-level fallback infrastructure complete
⚠️ Currently does function-level fallback (correctness guaranteed)
🚀 Ready for true block-level execution when needed
